title: pilosella auriculina subsp. firmisetiformis
intro: Pilosella auriculina subsp. firmisetiformis is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Pilosella auriculina plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Pilosella auriculina subsp. firmisetiformis are believed to include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Although more research is needed, it has been traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its potential medicinal benefits.
